title: AST DUI: McGrath [AK25059859]
summary: On 06/20/2025, McGrath AWT received a report of a possible drunk driver, driving recklessly in McGrath. AWT was out of town at the time. On 06/21/2025, while following up on the report, AWT contacted Justice MacAlpine while operating a motor vehicle on the roadway. Investigation determined MacAlpine was operating under the influence of alcohol. Charges were forwarded to the Bethel District Attorney's Office, and he was released to a sober party.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: the roadway

title: AST Criminal Mischief: Wasilla [AK25060047]
summary: On 6/21/2025 AST responded to Wasilla for the report of a disturbance. Investigation revealed Julian Nation-Perry had damaged the property of a household member. He was placed under arrest for Criminal Mischief in the 5th degree. He was remanded to the Mat-Su Pre-Trial facility and held on no bail.

subSources.summary: On 6/20/2025, Alaska State Troopers in Anchor Point were on a routine patrol in Voznesenka when they located Lara Basargin (37 years old) who had an outstanding felony arrest warrant.
